meta.generated_by: AI research engine (per-project discovery -> verification -> enrichment)
meta.notes: Deep per-project research across all 15 India Biochar CDR projects (same pipeline as the Malawi flagship). Discovery completed for every project; the verification and SBTi/industry enrichment stages were interrupted by an account rate limit, so verdicts are recorded as PLAUSIBLE (unrefuted) and buyer industry/SBTi profiles were completed manually from public sources (SBTi left Unknown — the identified buyers are CDR financiers, marketplaces, funds and developers that do not carry corporate SBTi targets). Confidence scores normalised to 0-100. Real disclosed buyers were found for 5 of 15 projects; the rest have no public buyer disclosure yet (most are pre-issuance). Strongest signals: Altitude's 180,000-tonne offtake with Equilibrium (Satyapura) and IMC Trading's 4,000-tonne offtake with Carboneers.

buyer_profiles.profile_summary: Swiss carbon-removal financier/forward-purchaser that funds CDR suppliers against multi-year offtakes. Signed a 180,000-tonne biochar offtake with India's Equilibrium (June 2026). Not an SBTi-target corporate (financier).

Germany-based durable-CDR marketplace and MRV+ tracking provider. The sales/distribution channel making Varhad's and Green Carbon's Indian biochar credits available to international buyers. Marketplace, not an end buyer.

Global proprietary trading firm (Amsterdam). Purchased 4,000 tonnes of biochar CDR from Carboneers via broker Cawa (delivery by 2030) — a genuine corporate offtaker of Indian biochar removal. SBTi status not established.

Swedish climate-funding platform whose Climate Transformation Fund pre-purchases carbon removals (incl. from Planboo x Carboneers). Its disclosed biochar delivery is a Ghana project, so its link to the India project is developer-level only.
Carbon-removal marketplace listing Carboneers biochar in its portfolio (distribution/reseller). No named end-buyer or tonnage for the specific India project.

Danish carbon-removal portfolio platform listing a Carboneers India biochar project (a different Carboneers listing from the Isometric high-tech project). Distributor/catalogue listing, not a confirmed purchase.
Marketplace intermediary that lists Project Reignite (VCS4679) and sources/retires credits on buyers' behalf. Channel/reseller, not a confirmed end-buyer.

Japanese carbon developer/certifier partnering with Varhad Capital and Carbonfuture to develop and market the Varhad biochar project. Acts as developer/seller/Japan channel, not the retiring end buyer.
A real contracted CDR order (5,278 t) recorded on CDR.fyi for Equilibrium where the purchaser's identity is withheld.

buyer_findings.volume_basis: 180,000 biochar CDR credits under a multi-year offtake covering Equilibrium's Indian biochar facilities (Isometric + Puro). Developer-level; Satyapura is one of Equilibrium's Isometric facilities.
buyer_findings.evidence_summary: CDR.fyi records a 'Contracted' order from Altitude for 180,000 t of Biochar Carbon Removal (Jun 4 2026, 0 delivered). Corroborated by Argus Media and Carbon Herald: India's Equilibrium signed a multi-year offtake with Swiss CO2-removal financier Altitude for 180,000 biochar credits to finance its Indian facilities.
CDR.fyi lists a second 'Contracted' Equilibrium biochar order of 5,278 t (Jun 5 2026) with purchaser 'Not Disclosed'. A real contracted transaction with a withheld counterparty.

buyer_findings.volume_basis: 4,000 t CDR offtake facilitated by broker Cawa; delivery by 2030.
buyer_findings.evidence_summary: CDR.fyi (Week 38 2025): 'IMC Trading purchased 4,000 tonnes of CDR from Carboneers, in an offtake agreement facilitated by Cawa', supporting Carboneers' India agri-waste biochar project. Carboneers' only India project on Isometric is this listing.

Milkywire pre-purchased biochar removals from the Planboo x Carboneers collaboration; sources indicate delivery from a joint project in Ghana, so the link to the India project is developer-level only.
Zopeful lists Carboneers biochar among its carbon-removal portfolio partners (distribution/reseller). No named end-buyer, tonnage or registry for the specific project.

Klimate lists a Carboneers India biochar project (a Global C-Sink Registry listing, distinct from this Isometric high-tech project). Portfolio/distributor listing, not a confirmed purchase of this project's credits.

buyer_findings.volume_basis: ~120,300 tCO2e project-lifetime credits (10-yr crediting, two initial 3,000 t/yr units) made available to international buyers via Carbonfuture; not a single confirmed purchase.
buyer_findings.evidence_summary: Multiple releases (Biochar Today, Green Carbon Inc., ccarbon.info) state credits from Varhad's cotton-stalk biochar project 'will be made available to international buyers through the Germany-based marketplace Carbonfuture', which runs MRV+ tracking. Distributor/marketplace, no end buyer named.

buyer_findings.volume_basis: Co-develops/certifies and markets ~120,300 tCO2e of supply via Carbonfuture; reflects supply marketed, not a purchase.
buyer_findings.evidence_summary: Green Carbon, Inc. (Japan) announced an April 2025 partnership with Varhad Capital and Carbonfuture to develop/certify the project under Isometric and make credits available to global offtakers. Developer/certifier/seller, not the retiring end buyer.

buyer_findings.volume_basis: Green Carbon/Varhad announcement covers Vidarbha-region facilities; link to the Kapadvanj facility specifically is unconfirmed.
buyer_findings.evidence_summary: Carbonfuture is the marketplace channel for Green Carbon's Indian biochar credits, but the disclosed deal explicitly covers Vidarbha (Maharashtra) facilities, not the Kapadvanj (Gujarat) facility of this listing — so this is an adjacent developer-level lead only.

Evertreen lists Project Reignite (VCS4679) for sale and 'acts as an intermediary: we source and retire credits on your behalf'. A reseller/marketplace listing — no named end-buyer, tonnage or completed transaction.

risks.risk_description: First-of-a-kind / early-stage execution risk. VCS4679 is Verra's first registered biochar project (Oct 2024) and a VM0044 pilot. No issuances, deliveries, retirements or named buyers found publicly as of mid-2026, despite a ~110,760 tCO2e/yr forecast.
risks.ai_summary: First-of-kind Verra biochar pilot with no confirmed issuances, deliveries or buyers disclosed — meaningful execution/delivery risk.

risks.risk_description: Biochar applied as a soil amendment; permanence of biochar carbon in soil is a recognized open issue VM0044 is still refining, and soil-application MRV is harder to verify than engineered storage.
risks.ai_summary: Biochar-in-soil permanence and MRV remain unresolved methodological issues for this project's methodology.

risks.risk_description: Registered under an early VM0044 version; over-crediting exposure stems from biochar carbon-content and stability assumptions. Mitigant: ICVCM later approved VM0044 v1.2 as meeting the Core Carbon Principles.
risks.ai_summary: Early VM0044 version + stability assumptions create over-crediting exposure, partly mitigated by later ICVCM CCP approval.

risks.risk_description: Early lifecycle: on Verra's 2024 public-comment listing and at 'verification approval requested'; no VCUs appear issued or retired, so delivery/timing risk and no verified-output track record.
risks.ai_summary: Pre-issuance project with no verified credits yet; delivery/timing risk pending verification.

risks.risk_description: Location/identity ambiguity: a near-identically named 'Biochar Production Project-1 by WeAct' surfaced associated with Madagascar, suggesting multiple similarly named WeAct projects or a records inconsistency to reconcile against the registry.
risks.ai_summary: Possible India vs. Madagascar naming/location inconsistency in WeAct biochar listings; verify against registry.

risks.risk_description: No offtake/forward-purchase found for Ground Up / Project Nandani in any registry, tracker, marketplace or press. S&P Global CDR Summit coverage stresses offtakes are essential for Indian biochar to reach financial close; absence of a disclosed buyer is a commercialization/financing risk for a small, recently seed-funded (~$117K) developer.
risks.ai_summary: No disclosed offtake despite industry consensus that offtakes are essential; combined with small seed funding this is a commercialization/financing risk.

risks.risk_description: Very early-stage scale-up risk. As of Jan 30 2026 approval, Satyapura had issued only ~1.47 tCO2e (0 retired), running at 10 TPD scaling to 50 TPD. Delivering against Equilibrium's 180,000 t offtake depends on unproven scale-up; CDR.fyi shows 0% delivery across Equilibrium's contracted volume.
risks.ai_summary: Nascent project with negligible issuance and a large planned throughput increase; delivery track record currently zero.

risks.risk_description: Sector-wide biochar durability uncertainty: 100-1000-year claims are extrapolated from short (1-2 yr) experiments. Isometric rated this project's reversal risk 'Very low' with a 2% buffer, mitigating but not eliminating the concern.
risks.ai_summary: Generic biochar permanence-extrapolation risk, partly mitigated by Isometric's very-low reversal rating and 2% buffer.

risks.risk_description: Kapadvanj Industrial Biochar is Under validation / in Isometric public comment, with first issuance expected Aug 2026. No issuance, delivery or retirement track record and no signed offtake disclosed for this specific facility.
risks.ai_summary: Pre-revenue, pre-issuance project; credits not yet verified/delivered, so delivery/performance risk is unresolved.

risks.risk_description: Very early stage: developer Earthrevive shows only ~5.6 certificates issued across two projects (0 retired), under validation — negligible verified issuance and material delivery/execution risk.
risks.ai_summary: Registry shows ~5.6 certificates issued, 0 retired; under validation — early-stage delivery risk.

risks.risk_description: Developer EKI Energy Services (EnKing International) faced a major over-crediting/integrity scandal over its improved-cookstove projects: a 2023 Climate Home News investigation found EKI-linked cookstove projects likely overstated reductions by up to 8x, and a Down To Earth/CSE field study found glaring design/implementation gaps under Verra VMR0006. Concerns EKI's cookstove portfolio, not VCS4774 specifically, but is significant developer-level integrity risk carrying into its new biochar project.
risks.ai_summary: EKI/EnKing cookstove credits were found over-credited by up to 8x in independent investigations — serious developer-integrity risk extending to its biochar venture.

risks.risk_description: EKI Energy is in severe financial distress, raising counterparty/delivery risk: its BSE-listed stock fell 97%+ from its Jan 2022 peak; revenue collapsed from ~Rs 1,800 cr (FY22) to ~Rs 263 cr (FY24) with a ~Rs 129 cr net loss, ICRA downgrade, and further losses into FY26. This fragility threatens its ability to fund/validate/deliver a new biochar project.
risks.ai_summary: EKI's stock lost 97%+ and it swung to sustained losses with a ratings downgrade — counterparty/delivery risk for its biochar project.

risks.risk_description: VCS4774 is 'Under validation' on Verra; no credits issued/verified/retired and no offtake or delivery located across Verra/Isometric/Puro registries, cdr.fyi, or marketplaces. No credible corporate biochar buyer is associated with it (their disclosed Indian deals are with other developers such as Varaha and Exomad Green).
risks.ai_summary: Under validation with zero issued credits and no locatable buyers/offtake in any registry, tracker or marketplace.

risks.risk_description: No public buyer, offtake, issuance or retirement found for 'Project Terre Boost' or developer SRCNatura across Verra, cdr.fyi, Isometric, Puro, marketplaces and press. Small/emerging developer with limited footprint and no named counterparties — no demonstrated demand-side traction versus peers (Varaha, Alt Carbon).
risks.ai_summary: AlliedOffsets' India CDR buyer overview names active developers/buyers but not SRCNatura/Terre Boost — no disclosed transaction traction.

risks.risk_description: Listed on Verra as 'Under development' (pre-registration/pre-issuance). No credits issued and no crediting/verification record yet, creating substantial delivery and timeline risk for prospective buyers of forward volumes.
risks.ai_summary: Pre-registration/pre-issuance project; no credits or verification record yet — delivery/timeline risk.
